metadata.title: Watch & Revise
metadata.audience: Humanitarians AI Fellows learning to use the Brutalist pipeline

beats.narration_text: Watch and Revise. Plain language in, better video out. Liam, in for Bear.

props.command: The video compiled but the bar chart in B02 shows the wrong data labels. How do I fix it without rebuilding everything?
output: Describe the defect in plain language

beats.narration_text: The revision loop has four steps: Watch, Note, Ask Claude, Updated Video. Watch the compiled review cut. Note what's wrong in plain language — no jargon, no code. Ask Claude to fix it. Claude edits the source, re-renders the affected beat, and recompiles. Then watch again.

props.sparkLine: Plain language in, better video out.

beats.narration_text: The Visual QC rule: after every compile, sample frames from the video and audit them. Eight points to check: edge bleed, title-safe margins, text overflow, element collision, legibility, brand accuracy, aspect ratio, and whether any placeholder slates remain unfilled.

props.title: visual QC
props.code:
# Sample frames after compile:
ffmpeg -i mp4/hai-brutalist-E10.mp4 \
  -vf fps=2 _qc/frames/%05d.png -y

# Audit 8 points:
# edge bleed / title-safe / overflow
# collision / legibility / brand
# aspect ratio / no blank slates

beats.narration_text: Revision language is plain language. Don't say: adjust the easing curve on the spring animation. Say: the bars pop in too fast in beat B02, make them slower. Claude translates plain language into the exact source edit. You review the result. Iterate until it's right.

artifactLines: Wrong: 'adjust the spring config damping to 30 in B02'
Right: 'the bars pop in too fast in B02, make them slower'
Right: 'the title in B04 overflows the right edge, shrink it'
Right: 'the narration in B01 says 18%, the chart shows 15%'

beats.narration_text: Plain language in, better video out. Watch, note, ask Claude, watch again. The loop is the process.

artifactLines: Watch the compiled review cut. Note what's wrong.
Describe defects in plain language — no code required.
Claude edits source, re-renders the beat, recompiles.
Sample frames for 8-point Visual QC after every compile.

beats.narration_text: Here's the prompt. I watched my compiled video and found three issues. One: the narration in B01 says eighteen percent but the chart shows fifteen. Two: the title in B03 is cut off on the right edge. Three: B05 runs two seconds too long. Fix all three and recompile. Run that prompt — Claude will fix each defect in sequence, re-render only the affected beats, and produce a new review cut. Episode eleven covers publishing — that's next.

props.command: Three issues: (1) B01 narration says 18% but chart shows 15%; (2) B03 title is cut off on the right; (3) B05 runs 2 seconds too long. Fix all three and recompile.

beats.narration_text: Watch and Revise. Episode ten of twelve. Next: Publish to the Channel.
